name: eq-session
description: EQP Platform session orchestration — loads shared/personal memory, routes tasks to the right skills/agents/references, manages context budget, and presents a resume

skills.name: session-start
skills.description: MANDATORY at session start — loads shared references, personal memory, git state, recent PRs

skills.name: manage
skills.description: Plugin lifecycle — status, sync from upstream, upstream PR, reset

skills.name: context-manage
skills.description: Mid-session router — routes tasks to skills/agents/references, audits context, dispatches subagents to keep the main window lean
